notes: Chunk contains a single event: part 1 of 2 of the Q4 FY2024 earnings call transcript (prepared remarks + early Q&A); part 2 is handled by another bot.
fiscal_kpis is null for this chunk, so no KPI rewrites; all candidates are grounded in transcript text.
All 41 evidence quotes were programmatically verified as exact substrings of the event content.

Skipped as vague or non-causal (8): bare consumer demand (category word), G&A guidance line, depreciation guidance line, adjusted EBITDA (reported figure only), profit flow-through (vague), KDS technology rollout (one-off operational detail subsumed by labor_productivity), non-alcoholic beverage category pressure (thin industry aside), total debt/liquidity balances (position reporting, not a cause).

cheesecake_factory-branded metrics were named at company level (e.g. same_store_sales, restaurant_level_margin) because the flagship brand name equals the company legal name, which is banned inside driver_name; North Italia and Flower Child brand metrics are coined as their own drivers per R9.
eps_surprise and revenue_surprise are measured against company guidance in the quoted text (results exceeded guidance); Q&A also notes the comp came in above consensus.
